overview: TrustCart AI is a professional SaaS platform that uses AI-powered heuristics to detect fake product reviews on e-commerce platforms. Users can analyze reviews, check product trustworthiness, view analytics dashboards, and admins can monitor platform-wide trends.
features: Review Analyzer with Fake Score, Trust Score, and pattern breakdown
Product Trust Checker with trust badge generation
User dashboard with fake vs. real charts and trend analysis
Admin panel for user management and platform analytics
Trust Badge System for embeddable AI-verified badges
Dark/light mode with smooth animations and SaaS design
User authentication and review history tracking
